rows.source_ref: forexalien, 'Alien's Extraterrestrial Visual Systems', ForexFactory thread 463573, 2017, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/463573 (PDF captures opening posts, forum pages 1-3)
rows.concept: Discretionary visual read of RSIOMA (>50 long, <50 short, >80/<20 strong trend) aligned across D1-to-M1, confirmed by a 5-speed ADX and an RSIOMA-vs-delayed-stochastic 'rubber band' separation, to ride momentum trends.
rows.eligibility_reason: Purely discretionary visual method: no numeric entry trigger, no exit/stop/take-profit or sizing rules stated; depends on proprietary custom indicators (RSIOMA variant with extra oscillator, 'D Delay Stochastic.ex4') with unknown internals.
rows.notes: Author self-describes as 'a Visual type of trader'; entries are eyeballed ('look for a place to start thinking about shorting'), exits are 'ride the trend to the end' / discretionary monitoring. Components mentioned but never fully specified: (1) RSIOMA 50/80/20 level system, (2) multi-timeframe wave alignment D1-M1, (3) 5-speed ADX 7/21/42/89/144 all-up/all-down trend gate, (4) RSIOMA+delayed-stochastic separation setup, (5) price-vs-RSIOMA divergence for reversals. Edge claims are marketing ('98% accuracy', hindsight chart examples) with no evidence trail. Would revisit only if OWNER supplies a fully mechanized rule set and the custom indicator sources; as posted it is not implementable.

notes: zero usable mechanical candidates; single REJECTED summary row; discretionary visual system, no entry/exit/stop rules, proprietary custom indicators
